post.description:
Encrypt and persist a provider key for this project.

Behaviour:
  - 422 on bad provider vocab or empty/short plaintext.
  - 409 if a key with the same fingerprint is already active for
        this provider in this project (re-paste of the same key).
  - 503 if `PROVIDER_KEY_VAULT_KEK` is unset/short — cipher refuses
        to write plaintext.
  - On success the previously-active row for (project_id, provider)
    is automatically revoked so only the new row is active.

get.description:
List provider keys for the calling tenant.

By default returns only active keys (is_active=true). The dashboard
uses include_revoked=true on the audit/history view to render
rotated keys.

parameters.name: provider

schema.description: Filter by provider; 422 if not in VALID_PROVIDERS
schema.title: Provider

parameters.description: Filter by provider; 422 if not in VALID_PROVIDERS

parameters.name: include_revoked

schema.description: When true, also returns is_active=false rows
schema.title: Include Revoked

parameters.description: When true, also returns is_active=false rows

get.description: Fetch a single key's metadata. 404 if missing or cross-tenant.

delete.description:
Revoke a key. Idempotent — calling on an already-revoked row
returns the same row unchanged. 404 if missing or cross-tenant.

parameters.name: anomaly_id

schema.title: Issue Id
schema.description: Compatibility wire filter retained as anomaly_id; filters by the Issue/internal detector grouping id.

parameters.description: Compatibility wire filter retained as anomaly_id; filters by the Issue/internal detector grouping id.

post.description:
Mark a tier-1 applied action as reverted. The actual config
rollback is handled by a downstream worker (deferred to a later
module). Returns 409 if the action is not in `applied` state or is
not tier-1.

Cancel a `pending` tier-2 action — the founder console uses
this to intervene before the auto-PR opens.

Returns:
  404 if the action does not exist for this tenant.
  409 if the action is tier-1 (use /revert) or not in 'pending'
      state (already applied / failed / skipped).

Re-dispatch a previously `failed` or `skipped` Tier-2 action.

Reads the original issue/internal grouping row and replay_run_id_gate
off the action row and re-runs `evaluate_tier2_dispatch` from scratch.
Because the dispatcher always writes a fresh row, this never mutates
the original action; the response describes the *new* action.

Requires the original action to be tier-2 and in one of the
non-applied terminal states. Tier-1 retries flow through the
Tier-1 revert/apply worker (not this endpoint).

Returns:
  404 if the original action doesn't exist for the tenant.
  409 if the action is tier != 2 or already in pending/applied.
  422 if the original action is missing the gate evidence
      (replay_run_id_gate is NULL) — happens on actions skipped
      BEFORE the gate was checked (e.g. entitlement gate).

get.description:
Return the project's pilot policy. First read seeds the §6.3
canonical default so the dashboard always has a row to render.

put.description:
Patch the project's pilot policy. Pydantic enforces the simple
type + range constraints (booleans, ge=0, ≤1, etc.); the service
layer merges with the stored policy, re-validates, and trims string
entries before persisting.

post.description: Ingest one business-outcome event and attribute it to a call.

get.description: Attribution summary: total cost + by-type + by-cluster (agent × detector).

post.description: Reconcile an agent's claimed outcome against system-of-record evidence.

get.description: List recent outcome reconciliation checks for the current project.

post.description: Verify a claimed state against one read-only PostgreSQL source row.
Fetch a refund from a ledger API and reconcile it against the agent claim.
Use the saved ledger connector to verify a refund without resending its secret.
Use the saved Stripe connector to verify a refund without resending its secret.
Use the saved Razorpay connector to verify a refund without resending its secret.
Fetch a CRM/customer record and reconcile it against the agent claim.
Use the saved CRM connector to verify a customer record without resending its secret.
Use the saved Generic REST connector to verify a custom system record.
Use the saved PostgreSQL connector to verify one source-of-record row.
Bridge webhook/HTTP agents into the saved connector verification runtime.

get.description: Summary of matched, mismatched, and not_verified outcome checks.
List reconciliation checks linked to a specific Zroky call.
Read one outcome reconciliation check.
All outcome events linked to a specific call.

schema.title: Response Get Outcomes For Call V1 Outcomes By Call  Call Id  Get

get.description: Compute the $ value of failures a replay run's candidate prompt would prevent.

post.description: Receive Zendesk ticket webhook and ingest escalations as outcome_events.

schema.title: Response Zendesk Webhook V1 Outcomes Webhooks Zendesk Post

post.description: Receive Salesforce Opportunity stage-change and ingest churn as outcome_events.

schema.title: Response Salesforce Webhook V1 Outcomes Webhooks Salesforce Post

post.summary: Upsert the current user's vote on a coming-soon feature.
post.description:
Create or update the current user's vote.

One vote per (subject, feature_key). Voting again overwrites
the previous answer. `use_case` is optional free-text (max 2000
chars) — encouraged when `vote == 'interested'`.

get.summary: Get the current user's vote on a coming-soon feature.
get.description:
Return the vote, or 404 if the user has not voted yet.

Also returns 400 if the feature_key is not in the registry — same
behavior as POST, so the dashboard can render the same error.

get.summary: Summary of all coming-soon features at a glance.
get.description:
Returns one summary per registered feature_key.

Includes features with zero votes so the dashboard can render a
consistent table.

get.summary: Summary + recent votes for a single feature_key.
get.description:
Returns the aggregate summary + recent_votes list.

Filters:
  • vote   = 'interested' | 'not_interested' (optional)
  • since  = ISO-8601 timestamp (optional, only votes after)
  • limit  = 1..500 (default 100)

get.summary: Export all votes for a feature_key as CSV.
get.description:
Stream a CSV of every vote on this feature_key.

Columns:
  created_at, updated_at, vote, user_email_masked, user_subject,
  project_id, project_name, use_case

post.description:
Legacy compatibility endpoint.

Razorpay Standard Checkout needs an order id, so new clients must call
`/v1/billing/razorpay/order` and then open Razorpay Checkout in-browser.
Create a Razorpay Standard Checkout order for a tenant-scoped plan.
Verify Razorpay checkout success signature and activate the paid plan.
Return the configured Razorpay dashboard URL for billing operations.
Signed Razorpay webhook receiver.

get.description:
Return the calling org's current plan and payment identifiers.

Auto-creates a free-tier shell `subscriptions` row on first call so
the dashboard never sees a 404 here. The plan_template field is the
effective resolved entitlement view used by dashboard plan gates.
Return hosted billing usage from current org-scoped meters.

AdminAllFeatures.title: AdminAllFeatures
AdminAllFeatures.description: All registered features at a glance for the owner dashboard.

AdminFeatureDetail.title: AdminFeatureDetail
AdminFeatureDetail.description: Summary + recent_votes for a single feature_key (paginated).

AdminVoteRow.title: AdminVoteRow
AdminVoteRow.description:
Single vote with masked email + project name for owner table view.

`user_email_masked` is the masked form (e.g. 'd***@acme.com').
The full email is intentionally NOT included to reduce screenshot
leak risk — the founder console can wire a separate "Reveal"
endpoint later if needed.

AdminVoteSummary.title: AdminVoteSummary
AdminVoteSummary.description:
Aggregate counts + share for one feature_key.

`status` is one of:
  • 'below_threshold'  — interested_pct < ships_after_threshold
  • 'above_threshold'  — interested_pct ≥ ships_after_threshold
  • 'no_votes'         — total == 0

sla_tier.title: Sla Tier
sla_tier.description: Reliability SLA tier: 'none' | 'team' | 'enterprise'. Mutated only by the Founder Console — the lifecycle sweep does NOT reset this on auto-downgrade so refund eligibility audits remain reconstructable.

plan_template.title: Plan Template
plan_template.description: Effective resolved entitlement template for the current org. Falls back to free when billing is incomplete, canceled, or unpaid, and includes active trial or override rows.

plan_code.title: Plan Code
plan_code.description: Self-serve plan code: 'starter' | 'team' | 'scale'. Legacy 'pilot' maps to 'starter', 'pro' maps to 'team', and 'plus' maps to 'scale'. 'enterprise' is sales-led; 'free' has no checkout.

customer_email.title: Customer Email
customer_email.description: Optional billing contact email for Razorpay reconciliation.

FeatureVoteRequest.title: FeatureVoteRequest
FeatureVoteRequest.description:
Body for POST /v1/feature-interest.

`use_case` is the free-text follow-up. Recommended (but not
required) when vote == 'interested' so we learn what fix
customers actually want auto-applied.

FeatureVoteResponse.title: FeatureVoteResponse
FeatureVoteResponse.description:
Returned by POST and GET /v1/feature-interest/me.

No vote counts are exposed — by design (decision: don't bias
customer votes via herd / social proof signal).

model_context_limit_catalog_updated_at.title: Model Context Limit Catalog Updated At

model_context_limit_catalog_stale_after_.title: Model Context Limit Catalog Stale After Days

IngestEventV2.title: IngestEventV2
IngestEventV2.description: Canonical schema for a single AI call event ingested by Zroky.

call_id.title: Call Id
call_id.description: Zroky call_id to attribute this outcome to.

outcome_type.title: Outcome Type
outcome_type.description: Business event type: refund_issued | ticket_escalated | human_handoff | churn | compliance_fine | retry_cost | custom

amount_usd.title: Amount Usd
amount_usd.description: Monetary cost of this outcome in USD.

occurred_at.title: Occurred At
occurred_at.description: When the event happened (defaults to now).

idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key
idempotency_key.description: Dedup key — same key + project always returns the same row.

anomaly_id.title: Issue Id
anomaly_id.description: Compatibility wire field retained as anomaly_id; identifies the customer-facing Issue/internal detector grouping row.

anomaly_id.title: Issue Id
anomaly_id.description: Compatibility wire field retained as anomaly_id; identifies the customer-facing Issue/internal detector grouping row.

PilotActionRetryResponse.title: PilotActionRetryResponse
PilotActionRetryResponse.description:
Augments the action with the dispatcher decision so the
founder console can render "Retry skipped — same gate failed"
without re-fetching the action row.

runtime_block_prompt_injected_external_a.title: Runtime Block Prompt Injected External Action

PilotPolicyPayload.title: PilotPolicyPayload
PilotPolicyPayload.description:
Strongly-typed mirror of the policy_json schema (plan §6.3).

Defaults intentionally mirror `services.pilot.DEFAULT_POLICY` so a
caller can omit any field and have it default to the canonical value.

runtime_block_prompt_injected_external_a.title: Runtime Block Prompt Injected External Action

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Provider identifier; must match the migration 0058 CHECK vocab

plaintext_key.title: Plaintext Key
plaintext_key.description: The actual provider API key (never echoed back)

ProviderKeyResponse.title: ProviderKeyResponse
ProviderKeyResponse.description:
Metadata-only wire shape. The dashboard renders identity using
`key_fingerprint` (first 8 chars) + `key_last4`.

plan_code.title: Plan Code
plan_code.description: Optional self-serve plan code. When present, the backend computes the INR paise amount from the pricing contract.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Custom order amount in the smallest currency unit; paise for INR.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: ISO currency code. Plan checkout currently uses INR.

receipt.title: Receipt
receipt.description: Optional Razorpay receipt id for reconciliation.
